query:
-- Add aliases column to fitasty_products if it doesn't exist
ALTER TABLE fitasty_products ADD COLUMN aliases TEXT COMMENT 'JSON array of search aliases (Chinese + English) for fuzzy search';

-- Create general_food_reference table for manual input suggestions
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS general_food_reference (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Primary food name (e.g., "雞胸肉" or "Chicken Breast")',
  aliases TEXT COMMENT 'JSON array of search aliases (Chinese + English variants)',
  category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Category: Protein, Carbs, Vegetable, Dairy, Fruit, etc.',
  defaultServingGram INT DEFAULT 100 NOT NULL COMMENT 'Default serving size in grams',
  caloriesPer100g DECIMAL(8,1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Calories per 100g',
  proteinPer100g DECIMAL(6,1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Protein per 100g',
  carbsPer100g DECIMAL(6,1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Carbs per 100g',
  fatsPer100g DECIMAL(6,1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Fats per 100g',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX general_food_reference_name (name),
  INDEX general_food_reference_category (category)
);

-- Create recent_food_items table for tracking recently used foods
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recent_food_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  foodType ENUM('general','fitasty') NOT NULL COMMENT 'Track source: general_food_reference or fitasty_products',
  foodId INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'ID from either general_food_reference or fitasty_products',
  foodName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Cached name for quick display',
  lastUsedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX recent_food_items_userId_lastUsed (userId, lastUsedAt)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3KVUcvtm8roQLHR.root --database btNuTCzqZzpzomYwWSYu4y --execute

  foodType ENUM('general','fitasty') NOT NULL COMMENT 'Track source: general_food_reference or fitasty_products',

  INDEX recent_food_items_userId_lastUsed (userId, lastUsedAt)
